key.name: color-battv
key.summary: Color of the BATTV data series on the Historical Summary graph

key.name: color-bcharge
key.summary: Color of the BCHARGE data series on the Historical Summary graph

key.name: color-linev
key.summary: Color of the LINEV data series on the Historical Summary graph

key.name: color-loadpct
key.summary: Color of the LOADPCT data series on the Historical Summary graph

key.name: color-timeleft
key.summary: Color of the TIMELEFT data series on the Historical Summary graph

key.name: use-systray
key.summary: Add an icon for the control panel to the systray

key.name: graph-interval
key.summary: A multiplier, of the network interval, that controls the number of seconds between graph updates

key.name: host-name
key.summary: The name of a host where apcupsd is running

key.name: network-interval
key.summary: The number of seconds between collections of status and event data from the network

key.name: ups-wattage
key.summary: The wattage rating of a UPS

key.name: use-systray
key.summary: Add an icon for this monitor to the systray
